narrative:
Cols 67-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,081 registered voters, with 69.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
